description_long: This car store consists of a large, rectangular commercial building with a flat roof, featuring a rooftop access structure and what appears to be a small outdoor seating or display area. The main building is accompanied by a paved lot in front, where multiple cars of various colors and models are neatly arranged, suggesting a showroom or dealership display. Adjacent to the main structure are two smaller outbuildings, one of which has a glass facade and a green lawn area, possibly serving as an office or customer lounge. The exterior of the main building is clad in light blue and gray materials, with large windows on the front, allowing visibility into the showroom. The overall layout is open, with clear vehicular access and parking spaces for both display and customer vehicles. The architectural style is modern, with clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and a focus on functionality.
description: A modern car store with a flat-roofed main building, large front windows, and a paved lot displaying multiple cars. The site includes smaller outbuildings and landscaped areas, emphasizing a clean, functional design.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the main building, glass-fronted outbuilding, green lawn, and a full display of cars in various colors parked in front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the main building, the rooftop structure, and the arrangement of cars lined up along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the main building, rooftop details, and the alignment of cars extending outward from the lot.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the glass outbuilding, green area, and the cars displayed in a row along the side of the main building.
attribute_displayed_cars: 13 cars visible in front of the building, including sedans and hatchbacks in pink, blue, white, black, gray, and yellow; arranged in rows facing the main entrance.
attribute_glass_facade: The smaller outbuilding features a prominent glass facade with full-height panels on the front; the main building has large front windows but not a full glass facade.
attribute_architectural_style: modern, with flat roofs, clean lines, and minimal ornamentation
